scripts.build: npm run codegen && npm run build:gate && cp dist/gate/index.js ../gate.js
scripts.codegen: mkdir -p schema && cargo run --quiet --manifest-path ../../Cargo.toml -- export-gate-schema --output schema/gate-spec.schema.json && npx json2ts schema/gate-spec.schema.json -o src/shared/types.gen.ts --bannerComment "// AUTO-GENERATED from Rust IR via cargo run -- export-gate-schema. Do not edit; run npm run codegen."
scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && vitest run -c vitest.config.smoke.ts
